pi_items.source: O*NET Online database for SOC code 13-2051.00 (Financial and Investment Analysts)
O*NET Online database for SOC code 13-2051.00
Task description specifies 'regional bank' and data explicitly represents bank statements
O*NET Online database for major group 13-0000
Analysis of the 5 Python bugs defined in the verifier.py and setup_task.sh files which directly target these precise domain concepts

privileged_info_summary: The task operates exclusively on synthetically generated bank statement and ledger data (injected via setup_task.sh) and requires debugging 5 specific Python domain-logic errors in a reconciliation engine. The bugs specifically cover decimal precision matching (fixing float == float comparisons), bid/ask spread application, timezone-aware date comparisons, correct tolerance thresholds (using max() instead of a single value), and signed exception grouping. The pass threshold requires fixing at least 3 out of the 5 bugs (60 out of 100 possible points).
